text.content: Dr Yili Huang outreach

Specialty Pharmacy program onboarding workflow defined 5/12: (1) Onboard providers + walk through script-submission steps; (2) Set drug favorites directly in their EMR; (3) 1-pager workflow orchestration delivered via email; (4) Patient education on televisit call awareness so scripts can be filled � no charge to patient or physician, customary drug-management service, not a billable visit.
